summary.en: A strategy reference for creating uncontested market space through value innovation, strategy canvas, four actions, six paths, and demand creation beyond existing industry boundaries.
summary.zh: 一本关于开创新市场空间的战略参考书，核心是价值创新、战略布局图、四步动作框架、六条路径，以及突破既有产业边界创造新需求。

recommendation.en: Use this when the team is trapped in competitor comparison. It helps turn a BMC or value proposition into a differentiated strategic profile rather than another feature-by-feature race.
recommendation.zh: 当团队陷入竞品对比和功能竞赛时，推荐用这本。它能把 BMC 或价值主张转换成差异化战略轮廓，而不是继续在同一条赛道上加功能。

sources.label: W. Chan Kim & Renée Mauborgne · Blue Ocean Strategy, Expanded Edition · Harvard Business Review Press · 2015
Blue Ocean Strategy · Strategy Canvas tool
